description: Synthesized timeout conditions for Libre BLE connection flow. Used for testing retry logic and timeout handling.
source: Synthesized from Libre2Manager.swift and LibreFaultInjector.swift specifications

timeout_scenarios.name: Scan timeout - no sensor found
timeout_scenarios.description: No Libre sensor advertisement detected within scan window

test_setup.mock_action: Return empty scan results until timeout

timeout_scenarios.name: Connection timeout
timeout_scenarios.description: BLE connection to peripheral fails to establish

timeout_scenarios.name: Service discovery timeout
timeout_scenarios.description: Peripheral connected but services not discovered

timeout_scenarios.name: Unlock timeout
timeout_scenarios.description: No response to unlock command during BLE authentication

tx_sent.description: Encrypted unlock payload with unlock count

expected_behavior.retry_strategy: Disconnect and reconnect with incremented unlock count

test_setup.mock_action: Write unlock command, never send notification response

timeout_scenarios.name: Glucose request timeout
timeout_scenarios.description: No response to glucose reading request after unlock

test_setup.mock_action: Unlock successfully, write glucose request, never send response

timeout_scenarios.name: Historic data fetch timeout
timeout_scenarios.description: Timeout while fetching historic glucose data from sensor memory

test_setup.mock_action: Start history fetch, never complete transfer

timeout_scenarios.name: NFC activation required timeout
timeout_scenarios.description: BLE connection attempted on sensor that hasn't been NFC activated

error.message: Sensor must be NFC activated first

expected_behavior.retry_strategy: Prompt user to scan sensor with NFC

test_setup.mock_action: Detect sensor but unlock fails with NFC-required response

libre_specific_considerations.name: Unlock count persistence
libre_specific_considerations.description: Unlock count must be persisted across app restarts to prevent desync
libre_specific_considerations.handling: Store unlockCount in Keychain, increment on each connection attempt

libre_specific_considerations.name: NFC activation dependency
libre_specific_considerations.description: Libre 2/3 requires NFC scan before BLE streaming works
libre_specific_considerations.handling: Store sensorInfo from NFC scan, use for BLE authentication

libre_specific_considerations.name: Sensor replacement detection
libre_specific_considerations.description: New sensor UID detected should clear unlock count
libre_specific_considerations.handling: Compare UID on connection, reset unlockCount if different

libre_specific_considerations.name: 14-day sensor life
libre_specific_considerations.description: Sensor expires after 14 days, timeout may be permanent
libre_specific_considerations.handling: Check sensor age, show expiration warning if close to 14 days

edge_cases.name: Timeout during unlock write
edge_cases.description: BLE write operation times out mid-transfer
edge_cases.handling: Cancel write, increment unlock count, retry

edge_cases.name: Timeout after partial glucose data
edge_cases.description: Received partial glucose frame before timeout
edge_cases.handling: Discard partial data, retry full request

edge_cases.name: System sleep during streaming
edge_cases.handling: Detect disconnect on wake, reconnect automatically

edge_cases.name: Region mismatch timeout
edge_cases.description: Sensor firmware doesn't respond to unlock (wrong region)
edge_cases.handling: Detect repeated unlock failures, suggest region-compatible app
